description: A comprehensive mastery of 100 sentence structures designed for IELTS Band 7.0+, covering Compound, Complex, Relative, Conditional, and Specialized academic structures.

data.ielts_application: Essential for Speaking Part 1 and 2 to avoid repetitive simple sentences and show basic coherence.

examples.sentence: My sister is a nurse, and she works in a dental clinic.
The Japanese eat a lot of fish, and they eat a lot of tofu too.
I want to eat sushi, so I am going to a Japanese restaurant tonight.
My father is under a lot of pressure, so I am trying to make him laugh.
My teeth hurt, so I made an appointment with the dentist.
The couple want to go to the musical, but there aren't any tickets left.
I wasn't very hungry, but I ate a lot.
Technology is beneficial, but it also poses cybersecurity threats.
Stop eating raw food, or you will have a stomachache.
You should wear a hat, or you might get sunburn.
The environment is fragile, yet many people ignore the damage.
I am very thirsty, but I don't have any money to buy drinks.
It is late, but I am still wide awake.
Our project is successful, and all of us are happy about it.
He performs very well, so he deserves the reward.
The phone doesn't work well, so Ana decided to buy a new one.
Janet thinks Chemistry is difficult, but she is still interested in it.
I have an allergy to seafood, so I cannot taste this dish.
This exercise is challenging, but it is extremely helpful.
The singer is suffering from a sore throat, so he won't perform.

data.ielts_application: The most important criteria for Band 7.0+ Grammatical Range. Used to show cause, effect, and concession in Writing Task 2.

examples.sentence: Although the training was tough, she decided to stay the course.
Because air pollution causes many diseases, we must plant more trees.
Since move to another city, he has grown apart from his friends.
While I was browsing the internet, I saw an informative advertisement.
Even though I enjoy biology, the dissection part makes me afraid.
If you overeat regularly, you will put on weight.
As soon as he graduated, he applied for a job at the BBC.
Provided that we reduce emissions, we can combat climate change.
Unless governments take action, environmental degradation will continue.
The city has developed quickly since the new policy was introduced.
I jog every morning so that I can keep fit.
While it is true that dropouts can succeed, they are not the norm.
Since technology is complex, I will explain it in layman's terms.
Although he is very young, he is a knowledgeable teacher.
We decided to stay indoors because it started to pour.
Even though the job is demanding, it is truly worthwhile.
I need to revise my notes before I take the final exam.
Once you get into the swing of things, the work becomes easier.
As long as we work as a team, we can achieve our targets.
He went on maternity leave after his child was born.

data.ielts_application: Used to clarify subjects and provide detail without starting new sentences. High score for complex structures.

examples.sentence: Students who excel academically are often eligible for scholarships.
The river, which was contaminated with toxic chemicals, is now clean.
I work for a company that specializes in renewable energy.
The man whose car was stolen is my neighbor.
This is the library where I spent months conducting research.
People who drink too much alcohol often feel weak.
The smartphone, which is a useful device, can be addictive.
She attends a prestigious university where she studies medicine.
The teacher who gave the lecture is a highly respected expert.
I saw an advertisement for a job that requires IT skills.
The habitat where pandas live is the bamboo forest.
The colleague with whom I collaborate is very supportive.
Environmental degradation, which is a global issue, needs attention.
He is a straight A student who always hits the books.
The school record book, which contains our grades, is kept safely.
I like small dogs which are friendly and active.
The city where I grew up has changed dramatically.
He is the manager who is in charge of the marketing team.
The software that he designed has gone viral.
Participants who complete the course will receive a diploma.

data.ielts_application: Used in Speaking Part 3 and Writing Task 2 to hypothesize about solutions and future consequences.

examples.sentence: If you heat ice, it melts.
If you don't wear thick clothes, you will be frozen.
If governments introduced stricter laws, pollution would decrease.
If I had studied harder, I would have passed with flying colors.
If you overeat, you will put on weight.
If I were the president, I would prioritize education.
If I had more free time, I would take up photography.
If the sun heats up the earth, the ice melts.
If you want to be taller, you should take in more calcium.
If the company had achieved its targets, we would have got a bonus.
If you use eye drops, your dry eyes will feel better.
If we had known about the traffic, we would have left earlier.
If I were you, I would apply for that lucrative job.
If you skip lessons, you will get into trouble.
If we protect biodiversity, the ecosystem remains stable.
If I had landed that job, my life would be different now.
If children have regular physical activity, they stay healthy.
If you hit the books tonight, you will pass the exam tomorrow.
If technology were simpler, life might be less stressful.
If you don't take vitamins, your immunity may weaken.

data.ielts_application: Structures that separate Band 6.0 from Band 8.0. Shows formal tone and emphasis.

examples.sentence: Radioactive waste must be disposed of safely.
It is widely recognized that education is a human right.
The more you practice, the more your skills will improve.
It is technology that has completely changed our lives.
Not only is he a good singer, but he is also a brilliant actor.
Steps need to be taken to address global warming.
Under no circumstances should we ignore the climate crisis.
Never before has the world faced such an alarming rate of ice melting.
It is essential that students be encouraged to think critically.
The higher the tuition fees, the fewer students can attend.
Hardly had I finished my dissertation when the deadline was announced.
It is said that regular exercise increases energy levels.
The river was contaminated by industrial waste.
What we need is a student-centered approach to teaching.
Only by working together can we solve the problem of poverty.
A thick layer of smog was seen covering the city.
The earlier the intervention, the better the outcome.
Rarely do we see such innovation in the private sector.
It was the scandal that ruined his promising career.
The new software is being developed to improve security.
